data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for priority levels.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the priority levels (blocking vs non-blocking) for punch list items. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of endpoints or functionality related to priority levels. The only related evidence is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate actual implementation or validation of this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for validating priority levels (blocking vs non-blocking).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the priority levels for punch list items.
